name: bilobalide
mechanism: Ginkgolides antagonize platelet-activating factor (PAF) receptors; bilobalide modulates GABAergic and glutamatergic transmission.
summary: Ginkgolides antagonize platelet-activating factor (PAF) receptors; bilobalide modulates GABAergic and glutamatergic transmission.
